candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; matches top-line revenue.

candidates.why: Candidate label exists, but one occurrence appears to be a broader operating-expense bucket that includes D&A, while another duplicate occurrence appears to be a smaller residual component; duplicate labeling makes this ambiguous.
Clear SG&A component.
SG&A-related but should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS per rule.

Amortization should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Amortization supplemental line, not SG&A overhead for this purpose.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses several clear SG&A component rows present in column A. I selected component overhead rows outside the candidate list to avoid the broader populated 'Other Operating Expenses' line, which appears to include D&A and would violate the exclusion rule. There are also duplicate 'Other Operating Expenses' labels, creating ambiguity about whether the sparse residual component can be safely added. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll Expenses, [Income Statement] Bad Debt Written-Off/Provision, [Income Statement] Acquisition Cost of Group Companies, [Income Statement] Restructuring Charges & Provisions

candidates.why: Best book equity line here because 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' clearly includes minority interest separately.
Includes minority interest, so using it for BE would risk double counting with MIB.
Entire balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total Equity' because minority interest is separately disclosed and should be captured in MIB, avoiding double counting.

Income statement attribution line, not preferred for MIB when a balance-sheet line exists.
